<a id="kind-distributeddatabaseprivateendpoint"></a>
## DistributedDatabasePrivateEndpoint

Manage OCI Distributed Database private endpoints.

- `Plural`: `distributeddatabaseprivateendpoints`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `distributeddatabase.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/distributeddatabase/v1beta1/distributeddatabaseprivateendpoint.md) (`config/samples/distributeddatabase_v1beta1_distributeddatabaseprivateendpoint.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.

<a id="kind-distributeddatabaseprivateendpoint-spec"></a>
### Spec

DistributedDatabasePrivateEndpointSpec defines the desired state of DistributedDatabasePrivateEndpoint.

| Field | Description | Type | Required | Default | Enum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `compartmentId` | Identifier of the compartment where private endpoint is to be created. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `definedTags` | Defined tags for this resource. Each key is predefined and scoped to a namespace. Example: `{"foo-namespace": {"bar-key": "value"}}` | `map[string, map[string, string]]` | No | - | - |
| `description` | DistributedDatabasePrivateEndpoint description. | `string` | No | - | - |
| `displayName` | Private endpoint display name. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `freeformTags` | Simple key-value pair that is applied without any predefined name, type or scope. Exists for cross-compatibility only. Example: `{"bar-key": "value"}` | `map[string, string]` | No | - | - |
| `nsgIds` | The OCIDs of the network security groups that the private endpoint belongs to. | `list[string]` | No | - | - |
| `subnetId` | Identifier of the customer subnet against which private endpoint is to be created. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
